content.text: Flake check passed. Now let me commit and push.

input.command:
git add home/workstation.nix modules/common/workstation.nix && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add Wayland flags for Chrome/Electron and JetBrains fix

Add xdg.configFile entries for chrome-flags.conf and
electron-flags.conf with Wayland platform and window decoration
flags. Set _JAVA_AWT_WM_NONREPARENTING=1 for JetBrains IDEs.
EOF
)"

input.command:
gh pr create --title "Add Wayland flags for Chrome/Electron and JetBrains fix" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Add `xdg.configFile` entries for `chrome-flags.conf` and `electron-flags.conf` with `--ozone-platform=wayland` and `--enable-features=WaylandWindowDecorations`
- Set `_JAVA_AWT_WM_NONREPARENTING=1` session variable for JetBrains IDE compatibility on Wayland

## Test plan
- [x] `nix flake check` passes

Run: 20260321-1629-d473
EOF
)"
